name: part_009
file: tmp_【 #百鬼あやめ7周年新衣装3D 】百鬼あやめ７周年記念ライブ  ～天女繚華～ 【百鬼あやめ⧸ホロライブ】 [uRa-uLMea7w]_gemini-3-flash-preview/reencoded/part_009.mov

scenes.description: Instrumental intro with traditional Japanese visuals: lanterns on water, cherry blossoms, and a large moon over a pagoda.
Nakiri Ayame performs 'Togetsukyo ~Kimi Omou~' in her new 7th anniversary 3D outfit on a Japanese-themed stage.
Nakiri Ayame talks to the audience about her anniversary live and her new matching microphone.

subtitles.original: 寄り添う二人に 君がオーバーラップ
subtitles.english: In the two huddling together, you overlap

subtitles.original: 色なき風に 思い馳せて
subtitles.english: Thinking of you in the colorless wind

subtitles.original: 触れた手の 温もり今も...
subtitles.english: The warmth of your hand I touched, even now...

subtitles.original: Stop 時間を止めて
subtitles.english: Stop, let time stand still

subtitles.original: そういつの日だって
subtitles.english: Yes, no matter the day

subtitles.original: 君の言葉 忘れないの
subtitles.english: I won't forget your words

subtitles.original: 会いたい時に会えない 会いたい時に会えない
subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't; when I want to see you, I can't

subtitles.original: 切なくて もどかしい
subtitles.english: It's painful and frustrating

subtitles.original: から紅に染まる渡月橋
subtitles.english: Togetsu Bridge dyed in deep crimson

subtitles.original: 導かれる日 願って
subtitles.english: Wishing for the day I'm guided there

subtitles.original: 川の流れに 祈りを込めて
subtitles.english: Pouring my prayers into the river's flow

subtitles.original: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you
subtitles.english: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you

subtitles.original: いつも こころ 君のそば
subtitles.english: My heart is always by your side

subtitles.original: いにしえの景色 変わりなく
subtitles.english: The ancient scenery remains unchanged

subtitles.original: 今この瞳に 映し出す
subtitles.english: Now reflected in these eyes

subtitles.original: 彩りゆく 季節越え
subtitles.english: Passing through the colorful seasons

subtitles.original: Stop 覚えていますか？
subtitles.english: Stop, do you remember?

subtitles.original: ねぇいつになったら
subtitles.english: Tell me, when will it be?

subtitles.original: また巡り会えるのかな
subtitles.english: That we'll be able to meet again?

subtitles.original: 会いたい時に会えない 会いたい時に会えない
subtitles.english: When I want to see you, I can't; when I want to see you, I can't

subtitles.original: この胸を 焦がすの
subtitles.english: It burns in my heart

subtitles.original: から紅に水くくるとき
subtitles.english: When the water is bound in deep crimson

subtitles.original: 君との想い つなげて
subtitles.english: Connecting my feelings with you

subtitles.original: 川の流れに 祈りを込めて
subtitles.english: Pouring my prayers into the river's flow

subtitles.original: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you
subtitles.english: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you

subtitles.original: いつも 君を探してる
subtitles.english: I'm always searching for you

subtitles.original: 君となら 不安さえ
subtitles.english: If I'm with you, even anxiety...

subtitles.original: どんな時も 消えてゆくよ
subtitles.english: ...will disappear anytime

subtitles.original: いつの間にか 優しく
subtitles.english: Softly, before I knew it,

subtitles.original: 抱きしめられるのかしら
subtitles.english: I wonder if I'll be held?

subtitles.original: から紅の紅葉達さえ
subtitles.english: Even the deep crimson maple leaves,

subtitles.original: 熱い思いを 告げては
subtitles.english: ...will declare their passionate feelings

subtitles.original: ゆらり揺れて 歌っています
subtitles.english: Swaying gently, they are singing

subtitles.original: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you
subtitles.english: I've been thinking about you, I've been thinking about you

subtitles.original: いつも いつも 君想う
subtitles.english: Always, always, I think of you

subtitles.original: いつも いつも 君想う
subtitles.english: Always, always, I think of you

subtitles.original: はい！というわけでここまでどうでしたでしょうか？
subtitles.english: Yes! So, how has it been so far?

subtitles.original: やー、もう数多くのゲストに出ていただいて、余は本当に嬉しいです。
subtitles.english: Wow, I'm so happy to have had so many guests join me.

subtitles.original: 本当に今回のね、ライブは最初にも言ったんですけど、ちょっと和風な感じでまとめさせていただいたので、
subtitles.english: As I said at the beginning, I put this live show together with a bit of a Japanese theme,

subtitles.original: 曲も、もうほぼほぼ全部和風っぽい感じで、ちょっと雰囲気をね、一つに統一して今回はライブを作らせていただきました。
subtitles.english: so almost all the songs have a Japanese feel, and I created the live show by unifying the atmosphere.

subtitles.original: そして、みんな気づいたかな？ちょっと歌ってる最中、ちょっと気づきました？これ。お、気づきました？
subtitles.english: And did everyone notice? Did you notice while I was singing? This. Oh, did you notice?

subtitles.original: 新しいマイクなんですよ。すごいでしょ？すごいでしょ？え、見て見て。
subtitles.english: It's a new microphone. Amazing, right? Right? Look, look.

subtitles.original: このちょっと、この分かりますか？このお腹の柄とちょっとお揃いなんですよ。
subtitles.english: Do you see this? It matches the pattern on my stomach.
